command: molecule-ranker discover --disease "Synthetic V3 biologics planning condition" --mode mocked --enable-biologics --output-dir "$OUTPUT_DIR" --json
what_output_does_not_prove: No antibody binding, safety, efficacy, manufacturability, therapeutic value, or clinical validity is proven.
No expression, purification, immunization, wet-lab protocol, synthesis instruction, or dosing guidance is provided.
what_output_means: Biologics planning artifacts can be included under V3 governance.
Generated antibody advancement would require human approval.
